title: Nether Portal Boom
description: This Mod will make your Nether Portal go boom if you ignite them.
body:
# NetherPortalBoom Nether Portal make Boom ![image](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/D1p4k/NetherPortalBoom/master/src/main/resources/assets/NetherPortalBoom/icon.png)
And you can even configure the Size of the Explosion :D ###### This Mod is used on ChainSMP, my German SMP [you can join, by clicking here](https://discord.gg/rthZpQwEYy).
